19673444.title: Charles Dawson Booker

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: English World War I fighter ace

19673444.description: English World War I fighter ace
19673444.extract: Major Charles Dawson Booker  (sometimes hyphenated into Dawson-Booker) (21 April 1897 – 13 August 1918) was an English World War I fighter ace credited with 29 victories. He was promoted to high rank while relatively young as a result of his gallantry and unswerving dedication to his country.
